notes: v0.20.2 — HOME REDESIGN + ANIMATED LOGO + BG BLEED. HOME tab now leads with a wide FEATURED hero banner (event highlight + Queue Multiplayer CTA) and three equal cards below — DAILY / SEASON / RECENT. The old NEWS-Focused split is dropped. Top-left PULSEWAVE wordmark is now the animated CHEVRON PULSE logo: three chevrons opening + closing on a sine pulse, gradient cyan → magenta. Hub panels (right-panel cards, nav rail, profile bar) dropped to ~72-78% opacity so the synthwave background (grid + sun + flyby ships) actually shows through the chrome edges.
